MINT.product_description: FINE+ is the best selling MINT PDO thread of all time. You get a powerful 18cm long bi-directional thread pre-loaded in a 18G W type cannula. It's versatile, easy to use, and has the reliable tensile strength and anchorage you need to approximate sagging tissue.
MINT.shipping:
Orders placed Monday through Friday by 3:30 PM PT (excluding holidays) will ship the same day via:
UPS Ground (1-5 Business Days): $30.00
UPS Next Day Air (Next Business Day by 10:30 AM): $100.00
Orders over $2,000 subtotal receive free shipping (Ground or Next Day Air, depending on product eligibility).
MINT.return_and_exchange: If you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, you may return eligible items within the return timeframe. All products are subject to an inspection and approval process.
MINT.shelf_life: All MINT Lift® products will have at least one year of shelf life from the purchase date (unless specified otherwise).
MINT.disclaimer: MINT Lift® barbed PDO threads are a Class II medical device and subject to regulation by the US FDA, as well as state and local regulatory agencies. The MINT Product Family consists of polydioxanone (PDO) sutures, indicated for soft tissue approximation where the use of a barbed absorbable suture is appropriate (K130191, K192423). Additionally, these sutures are indicated for use in face suspension surgery to temporarily fixate the cheek subdermis in an elevated position (K220549).

MINT.product_description: This is a unique multi-directional thread pre-loaded into a 18G W-Type cannula. It is 15cm long and has multi-directional barbs molded across 9.5cm of the thread. Because the direction of barbs alternates, it securely anchors onto soft tissue in all directions. It is often used as a supplementary thread to bi-directional thread to “super glue” or “velcro” them into place.

MINT.product_description: True to its name, this 43cm thread helps support and anchor sagging tissue across large areas. It is used with a temporal needle to create the entry point and a double blunt cannula. The blunt cannula helps the user navigate the underlying structures of the skin with less chances of side effects. Once the cannula is in position, it is removed and the thread is fed through the sharp outer “sheath”. The sheath is then removed from the exit point and the thread is left to engage onto the tissue.

TargetCool.product_description:
TargetCool is a FDA cleared medical device designed to deliver an instant boost to your favorite topical solutions with minimal downtime and discomfort. It is also the first device of its kind capable of precise tissue cooling at controlled temperatures. It offers a versatile solution for improving and elevating both aesthetic and medical procedures.

TargetCool’s advanced technology ensures precision temperature management and reinvents skin cooling with its 3 modalities.
TargetCool.includes:
1 TargetCool Device:
1 Boosting Guard
1 Boosting Nozzle
1 Cooling Nozzle
1 Freezing Nozzle
1 USB-C Charger
1 Cradle (Device Stand)
2 Triangle Kits, with each kit containing:
10 CO2 Cartridges
10 Cooling Guards
10 Filters
1 Box of Boosting Container Type 1 Box (10 pieces)
klardie Ruby compatible
1 Box of Boosting Container Type 3 Box (10 pieces)
klardie Dia compatible
2 Box of klardie Cellup Dia Solution (10 vials)
2 Box of klardie Cellup Ruby Solution (10 vials)
TargetCool.boosting_mode:
Using compressed CO2 cryogen, micronized frozen particles of solution are dispersed onto the skin for quick and uniform delivery (Temperature: 2-4°C). This can greatly reduce pain, discomfort, and recovery time compared to more abrasive skin treatments. It can also be paired with existing aesthetic procedures to help maximize the uptake of the desired solution.

Compatible Product: klardie Cellup Solution, skin boosters, exosomes, skincare

Compatible Procedures: Microneedling, RF microneedling, lasers, energy-based treatments
TargetCool.cooling_mode:
Deliver rapid and controlled cooling at a precise temperature and duration of your choosing (Temperature control: -10-5°C). By applying target cooling to the selected area, patients can experience a temporary reduction in pain that leads to a more comfortable procedure experience. Treated areas are also less susceptible to bruising, swelling, and inflammation to aid in faster recovery.

Compatible Procedures: PRP, botulinum toxin, dermal filler, lidocaine and nerve block injections, hyperhidrosis
TargetCool.freezing_mode: This mode delivers targeted cryotherapy to a precise spot in a matter of seconds while protecting surrounding tissue (Temperature: -79°C). Freezing mode can aid in the removal of skin conditions, such as skin tags, seborrheic keratosis, warts, benign skin lesions, and more.
TargetCool.technical_specifications:
TargetCool Device
Energy Type: Carbon Dioxide
Size: 149(L) x 248(H) x 39(W) mm
Weight: 457g / 1lb
TargetCool Charger
Input: AC 100-240V-50/60Hz 600mA
Output: DC 5V—3A, 9V—3A, 12V—2.5A, 15V—2A, 20V—1.5A
Mode Selection: PL, Continuous, Manual
Target Temperature Accuracy: ±1.5°Cw
TargetCool.operating_and_storage_conditions:
Operating Condition
Temperature: 15°C~30°C (59°F~86°F)
Humidity: 30%~80%
Atmospheric Pressure: 700~1060 hPa
Storage Condition
Temperature: -40°C~70°C (-40°F~158°F)
Humidity: 10%~90%
Atmospheric Pressure: 500 hPa~1060 hPa
TargetCool.warranty: TargetCool Products are covered by a one-year limited warranty from the purchase date. The warranty covers repairs and replacement of products, but not returns.
TargetCool.shipping:
Orders placed Monday through Friday by 3:30 PM PT (excluding holidays) will ship the same day via:
UPS Ground (1-5 Business Days): $30.00
Orders over $2,000 subtotal will receive free shipping via UPS Ground.
TargetCool products are not eligible for shipping to Alaska and Hawaii.
TargetCool.return_and_exchange: If you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, you may return eligible items within the return timeframe. All products are subject to an inspection and approval process.
TargetCool.disclaimer: TargetCool is a Class II medical device and subject to regulation by the US FDA, as well as state and local regulatory agencies. TargetCool is indicated for the temporary reduction of pain, swelling, inflammation, and hematoma from minor surgical procedures, minor sprains or other minor sports injuries, and as an adjunct to rehabilitative treatment (e.g., intermittent cold with stretch) (K230599).
